entry.title: New IDC SAQMMA10D0017 awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION for the amount of $2,500

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: GLOBAL SUPPORT STRATEGY PROVIDES SUPPORT SERVICES FOR NONIMMIGRANT AND IMMIGRANT VISA OPERATIONS AT US CONSULATES AND EMBASSIES ABROAD.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
